allow:
Bash(powershell -Command "
# 比赛图标 - 灰色 \(81x81 简单圆形\)
$matchIcon = ''''
[System.IO.File]::WriteAllBytes\(''match.png'', [Convert]::FromBase64String\($matchIcon\)\)

# 比赛图标 - 蓝色激活状态
$matchActiveIcon = ''''
[System.IO.File]::WriteAllBytes\(''match-active.png'', [Convert]::FromBase64String\($matchActiveIcon\)\)

# AI图标 - 灰色
$aiIcon = ''''
[System.IO.File]::WriteAllBytes\(''ai.png'', [Convert]::FromBase64String\($aiIcon\)\)

# AI图标 - 蓝色激活状态
$aiActiveIcon = ''''
[System.IO.File]::WriteAllBytes\(''ai-active.png'', [Convert]::FromBase64String\($aiActiveIcon\)\)

# 历史图标 - 灰色
$historyIcon = ''''
[System.IO.File]::WriteAllBytes\(''history.png'', [Convert]::FromBase64String\($historyIcon\)\)

# 历史图标 - 蓝色激活状态
$historyActiveIcon = ''''
[System.IO.File]::WriteAllBytes\(''history-active.png'', [Convert]::FromBase64String\($historyActiveIcon\)\)

# 我的图标 - 灰色
$profileIcon = ''''
[System.IO.File]::WriteAllBytes\(''profile.png'', [Convert]::FromBase64String\($profileIcon\)\)

# 我的图标 - 蓝色激活状态
$profileActiveIcon = ''''
[System.IO.File]::WriteAllBytes\(''profile-active.png'', [Convert]::FromBase64String\($profileActiveIcon\)\)

Write-Host ''Icons created successfully!''
")
